reason: This is a direct quote from the Quran (3:96) about the Kaaba in Mecca. It contains no extremist content or ISIS-related messaging.
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Islamic Teachings and Quotes
original_post: { إِنَّ أَوَّلَ بَيْتٍ وُضِعَ لِلنَّاسِ لَلَّذِي بِبَكَّةَ مُبَارَكًا وَهُدًى لِّلْعَالَمِينَ } -
